Hero.description: I build modern, accessible, and scalable web applications using React, TypeScript, and Next.js.

About.title: About Me
About.paragraph1: I am a frontend developer with a strong focus on clean, accessible, and user-centered web interfaces. I enjoy translating complex requirements into clear and maintainable UI solutions.
About.paragraph2: I have worked in both agency and modern frontend environments, collaborating closely with designers and developers to deliver responsive and scalable web applications.

Resume.title: My Resume
Resume.intro: Frontend developer with professional experience in UI-focused web development, combining modern frontend technologies with strong design sensibility.
Resume.expCalvergy: Worked on modern frontend interfaces using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS with a strong focus on UI/UX, responsiveness, and maintainable component architecture.
Resume.expNaarvan: Developed and maintained CMS-based websites, customized frontend templates, and collaborated with design and content teams to ensure consistent cross-browser presentation.
Resume.expRahavard: Created and managed digital content while supporting the design and structure of user-friendly web platforms with a strong focus on usability.
